display_text: Legion Commander Aghanim's Scepter: Increases Duel duration and grants debuff immunity during Duel. This is a critical anti-disable upgrade, ensuring Legion Commander remains unstoppable during Duels, preventing counter-initiation with silences, slows, or other debuffs.
search_text: Legion Commander Aghanim Scepter anti-disable debuff immunity Duel counter-initiation

display_text: Legion Commander Aghanim's Shard: Permanently increases Duel damage by 5 per win, retroactively applied. This upgrade emphasizes Legion Commander's role as a snowballing threat, accelerating her ability to dominate late-game Duels and punish enemy cores more effectively.
search_text: Legion Commander Aghanim Shard Duel damage snowball late-game core punish
